headlines.description: — Franz Wagner scored 27 points, Desmond Bane added 22 points and seven assists and the Orlando Magic beat the Boston Celtics 123-110 Friday night in their NBA Cup opener.

events.name: Houston Rockets at San Antonio Spurs

headlines.description: — Harrison Barnes scored 24 points, Julian Champagnie and Victor Wembanyama added 22 points apiece and the San Antonio Spurs beat the Houston Rockets 121-110 on Friday night in the NBA Cup opener for both teams.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barnes, Wembanyama lead Spurs to a 121-110 win over Rockets in the teams' NBA Cup opener
